query: A WAITING_REVIEW PR has had no reviewer activity for 10 days — what should it surface?
expected_behavior: For each WAITING_REVIEW PR, queries gh api users/<reviewer>/events?per_page=10 to find the reviewer's most recent public activity.
If last_activity_days > 7: surfaces 'reviewer @X last active N days ago — likely OOO' in a separate WAITING_REVIEW_OOO bucket.
Recommends redistributing to the next-best CODEOWNERS team (fallback path) rather than just pinging.
Caveat acknowledged: only public activity is visible, so the OOO signal is a heuristic; surface as suggestion, never auto-action.
